title: Sardis
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Quote|What is that???|Unidentified Rebel pilot during the assault on Space Station ''Obsidian''|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
[[File:TIEExperimentalProjectMission05-XWA.png|thumb|right|[[TIE Experimental Project|Experimental TIEs]] defend the ''Sardis'' from Rebel [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]].]]
The '''''Sardis''''' was an [[Imperial Research Ship]] that performed a critical function as part of the [[TIE Experimental Project]].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] encountered the ''Sardis'' during the Alliance's attempt to destroy the research station [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|''Obsidian'']]. However, the Imperials had been caught unaware of the plot, and the ''Sardis'' was unable to perform to its peak efficiency either because it was unmanned, or its systems were not yet operational. The research ship was designated a primary target, and it gave no apparent defensive fire as a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] led by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] destroyed it and the station, effectively ending the program.

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
